name: Kaidou
description:
__Height:__ 710 cm (23'4")
__Origin:__ Grand Line 
__Residence:__ ~!Wano Country (Onigashima) Vodka Kingdom (former)!~
__Affiliations__: ~!Rocks Pirates (former)
Beast Pirates (current)!~
__Devil Fruit__: ~!Uo Uo no Mi, Model: Seiryu (Fish-Fish Fruit)!~
__Devil Fruit Type__: ~!Mythical Zoan!~
__Bounty__: ~!4,611,100,000!~

Kaidou is one of the Yonkou (four emperors), and the third to be mentioned by name. Kaidou's name is first mentioned by Gekko Moriah shortly after having obtained Luffy's shadow. His title is revealed just after the Straw Hats defeat Moriah.
